sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115266" key="yaikalou=xon" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψαικαλοῦχον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔμβρυον,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψαῖμα·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀλίγον</foreign> Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψαῖσμα.</foreign> </entryFree>
